scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; if [ "${CI:-}" = "true" ] || [ "${RENDER:-}" = "true" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*|bun/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm or bun instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: bun run typecheck && bun -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck:libs && bun -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
